firmware.title: Tcard_X671B-H331EF-T-GL-230712V312
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X671B-H331EF-T-GL-230712V312
Optimized Issues:
1. Upgraded Android version from Android 12 to Android 13.
2. Upgraded XOS from XOS 10.6 to XOS 13.
3. Upgraded/added some features to improve the overall experience, including but not limited to 5G Preferred, Mobile Cloner, Lightning Multi-Window 4.0, Multiple Users, PC Connection, Notepad, and Smart Panel.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XCLUB (Geekbar) for more information.
